name: Pork Tenderloin with Hawiian Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the pork broth, brown and yellow mustards, horseradish, ketchup, brown sugar, and minced garlic. Bring to a simmer and keep warm by reducing the stock.
2. Grill the pork tenderloin, turning occasionally to prevent burning, while brushing with the sauce.
3. Remove the pork from the grill when it reaches an internal temperature of 170°F (about 1 hour on low heat).
4. Grill vegetables and pineapple during the last half of the cooking time.
5. Serve the grilled meat with the vegetables and pineapple.
